phrase_tracker_add.event_note: L1 calque (запомни/запомните). ~10x across 2026-02 to 2026-05 chats. Default opener for instructions.
Register: 'elaborate on' is academic; 'lay out' is the business-email native
L1 calque (в конце); 'at the end' is location, 'in the end' is conclusion

phrase_tracker_add.natural: exactly reversed / the other way around
phrase_tracker_add.event_note: Adverb without noun; native uses 'reversed' or 'the other way around'
Calque (делать движение); native uses the verb directly
Stiff nominalization for the ride type
Register: 'propose how to add modifications' is academic; native is just 'suggest changes'
Idiom misremembering. 'Hand to hand' is combat; 'hand in hand' is cooperation.
L1 calque (я подумал сделать); native uses 'thinking of/about'

weak_patterns_add: gerund after suggest/start/help/recommend/avoid — defaults to 'to V' form. 4-month evidence across claude.ai chats: 'I started to have my doubts' (2026-02 + 2026-05), 'I suggest to draw out' (2026-04), 'I suggest to keep' (2026-05), 'Helped to avert' (2026-04). Cross-context [biz_oil] + [claude_collab]. Candidate for focused 8-10 item error_correction drill on the closed verb set (suggest/start/help/recommend/avoid/finish/keep/consider + V-ing).

'in case of X' calque (в случае X) — defaults to 'in case of' where native uses 'for X' / 'when X' / 'if X'. Recurred 2026-02 ('in case of large modeling exercises' [biz_oil]) and 2026-04 ('in case of shorter periods' [leisure_sport]). Cross-context, easy drill: 4-6 item error_correction on the conditional substitutes.
strong_patterns_add: business/CV register — comfortable with Latinate vocabulary (professionalise, facilitated, modernization, stakeholder engagement, project finance, EPC dynamics), structured bullets, formal email conventions. Clear growth Feb→May 2026: Feb avoided multi-syllable Latinate vocabulary; May reaches for it confidently across CV-editing sessions.

descriptive narrative (travel/cycling) — well-paced descriptive prose by March 2026. Examples: Fethiye camp feedback email (2026-03-28), Lycian coast descent narrative (2026-03-29). Register is in active production, not just receptive.

recent_observations_add.note: [data] Volume-driven register growth — 1,507 substantive English messages across 4 months in claude.ai (Feb 165, Mar 586, Apr 506, May 250 partial). Business/CV vocabulary by May shows real comfort vs Feb baseline. Volume in Mar-Apr (1,092 msgs) likely the engine.
recent_observations_add.author: claude_code

recent_observations_add.note: [inferred] Sentence structure improving — Feb msgs run long/rambly (single sentences with 4+ clauses joined by 'while'/'and'); May msgs more punctual (Q:/A: pattern, short fragments OK, less subordination). Likely shaped by claude.ai chat format expectations.
recent_observations_add.author: claude_code

recent_observations_add.note: [data] Persistent gerund-after-X (suggest/start/help) across all 4 months — same surface error Feb to May, no self-correction. Distinct from PV cold-production gap (already captured). Drilling target — see weak_patterns_add.
recent_observations_add.author: claude_code
